class.name: SaveServer
class.description: [SaveServer] is a singleton responsible for managing data storage on disk for the Godot Engine. It abstracts I/O complexity in separate threads (non-blocking). It ensures that game state snapshots are persisted asynchronously as [Snapshot] resources in [code].tres[/code] format, allowing for easy inspection, version control integration, and automatic game version tracking.

method.name: delete_slot
method.description: Permanently removes the [Snapshot] file from the specified slot.

method.name: has_slot
method.description: Returns true if the specified save slot ([code].tres[/code]) exists on disk.

method.name: load_slot
method.description: Loads a [Snapshot] resource and returns its [code]snapshot[/code] data. Returns an empty dictionary if the slot does not exist or is corrupted.

method.name: load_snapshot
method.description: Loads a [Snapshot] from disk and recursively restores the state in the hierarchy starting from the [param root] node.

method.name: register_migration
method.description: Registers a migration callback to transform save data from version [param from] to [param to].

method.name: save_slot
method.description: Wraps the [param data] into a [Snapshot] resource and saves it. Supports optional [param metadata] and a [param thumbnail] (e.g. screenshot).

method.name: save_snapshot
method.description: Creates a recursive snapshot starting from [param root]. Can filter properties using [param tags].

members.member: If true, a backup (.bak) of the previous save is kept to prevent data loss.
The level of validation performed when loading a save.
The base directory where [code].tres[/code] or [code].data[/code] snapshot files will be stored.

constants.constant: No integrity checks are performed. Fastest loading.
Check SHA-256 signature to detect corruption or casual tampering.
Strictly validate both signature and version compatibility before loading.
The save file is busy or locked by another process.
Not enough disk space to complete the operation.
The provided data for saving is invalid or non-serializable.
The loaded data's checksum did not match the file content, indicating corruption or tampering.
The loaded data version is incompatible with the current game version.
